allow: Bash(python -c " import vgamepad as vg import inspect print\(inspect.getsource\(vg.VX360Gamepad\)\) ")
Bash(python -c "from importlib.metadata import version; print\('mcp:', version\('mcp'\)\); print\('pydantic:', version\('pydantic'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import vgamepad as vg; print\('XUSB_BUTTON members:'\); print\([x for x in dir\(vg.XUSB_BUTTON\) if not x.startswith\('_'\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "from mcp.server.fastmcp import FastMCP; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(FastMCP.__init__\)\)")
